title: Garlicky Silky Mediterranean Eggplant Stifado
description: A rich, garlicky eggplant dish inspired by Mediterranean cuisine, perfect for post-workout recovery. This stifado is an Ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly twist on traditional recipes.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a good quality oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: chicken broth
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium broth for a healthier option

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Sauté the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and sauté for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the eggplant and sauté until tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, honey, and bay leaf. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the flour and stir to thicken the sauce.
If desired, flambe the dish with a small amount of red wine for added flavor.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
